text.title: AI Latency Waterfall Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from instrumentation to actionable recommendation.

step.name: verify-instrumentation
step.action: Confirm spans exist for: ttfb, prefill (with cache_hit flag), decode, each tool round-trip, post-process. If any segment is missing, instrument before continuing.

step.name: sample-window
step.action: Draw ≥30 traces uniformly from the chosen window.
step.decision-gate: If n < 30, extend window before continuing.

step.name: compute-percentiles
step.action: For each segment compute p50 and p95 ms. For prefill, split cached vs cold; compute cache_hit_rate.

step.name: diff-vs-budget
step.action: Mark each segment OK/OVER; pick biggest_over_budget_segment by (observed - budget).

step.name: recommend
step.action: Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml to produce a recommendation that names the segment.
